revision.text:
[[ja:波布比咩命神社 (下田市)]] {{Infobox religious building | name = Habuhime Shrine (Shimoda) | native_name = 波布比咩命神社 (下田市) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Habuhime Shrine (Shimoda) | coordinates = {{coord|34.680194|138.945083}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Habuhime Shrine (Shimoda)'''|波布比咩命神社 (下田市)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Izu Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11380552|ltq=Q11380552|qid=Q11380552|1=List of Shikinaisha in Izu Province}} ** Series ordinal: 2 ** Series ordinal: 38 ** P155: {{ill|Mishima Taisha|lt=Mishima Taisha|el|Μισίμα Τάισα|en|Mishima Taisha|fr|Mishima-taisha|ja|三嶋大社|zh|三嶋大社|qid=Q650772|1=Mishima Taisha}} ** P155: {{ill|Q135039661|ltq=Q135039661|qid=Q135039661|1=Hotsusakeno- Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Ikamuhimeno- Shrine|lt=Ikamuhimeno- Shrine|qid=Q135039637|1=Ikamuhimeno- Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q134930376|ltq=Q134930376|qid=Q134930376|1=Hajikama Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q653402|ltq=Q653402|qid=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}} * {{ill|Izu Province|lt=Izu Province|ar|مقاطعة إزو|be|Ідзу (правінцыя)|ckb|پارێزگای ئیزو|cs|Provincie Izu|cv|Идзу|de|Provinz Izu|en|Izu Province|es|Provincia de Izu|fa|ولایت ایزو|fr|Province d'Izu|gl|Provincia de Izu|hak|Yî-theu-koet|id|Provinsi Izu|it|Izu (provincia)|ja|伊豆国|ko|이즈국|lt|Idzu žemė|nl|Izu (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Izu|pt|Província de Izu|ru|Идзу (провинция)|simple|Izu Province|sk|Izu (provincia)|sr|Провинција Изу|th|แคว้นอิซุ|tr|Izu (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ідзу|zh_min_nan|Izu-kok|zh_yue|伊豆國|zh|伊豆國|qid=Q860928|1=Izu Province}} * {{ill|Q961511|ltq=Q961511|qid=Q961511|1=Kamo District, Shizuoka}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.680194|138.945083}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 181570 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} * 181606 ** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11504610|ltq=Q11504610|qid=Q11504610|1=Unranked}} * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * はぶひめのみことじんじゃ * ハフヒメノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō * オホツノユキノ-Engishiki Jinmyōchō == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Hafuhimeno- Shrine|lt=Hafuhimeno- Shrine|qid=Q135039636|1=Hafuhimeno- Shrine}} * {{ill|Q135039662|ltq=Q135039662|qid=Q135039662|1=Ohotsunoyukino- Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '静岡県下田市東本郷1-7', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '静岡県下田市本郷595', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:波布比咩命神社 (下田市)]] {{wikidata link|Q134930633}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Habuhimenomikoto Shrine |Image = {{Image needed|cat=Shimoda City}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=250|coord={{coord|34|40|48.7|N|138|56|42.3|E}}}} |Location = {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|qid=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}} Higashi-Hongo 1-7 (former address: Hongo 595) |Coordinates = {{WikiCoordinates DMS|34|40|48.7|N|138|56|42.3|E|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = Habuhimenomikoto |Shrine rank = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (disputed shrine) |Founded = |Main hall = |Alternate name = |Pilgrimage status = |Annual festival = October 15 |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Shizuoka|label=Habuhimenomikoto
Shrine|coordinates= {{coord2|34|40|48.7|N|138|56|42.3|E}}|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} }} '''Habuhimenomikoto Shrine''' (はぶひめのみことじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in Higashi-Hongo (formerly Hongo), {{ill|lt=Shimoda City|Q653402|qid=Q653402|1=Shimoda, Shizuoka}}, {{ill|lt=Shizuoka Prefecture|Q131320|qid=Q131320|1=Shizuoka Prefecture}}.[http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402102 Habuhimenomikoto Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines === Overview === The shrine is situated immediately north of the east exit of {{ill|lt=Izukyū-Shimoda Station|Q6102244|qid=Q6102244|1=Izukyū Shimoda Station}}, about a one-minute walk away, and directly north of Shimoda City Hall (Higashi-Hongo Office). Habuhimenomikoto Shrine is considered a disputed candidate for designation as a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, along with Ōtsunoyukinomikoto Shrine. With regard to the former, it is often interpreted as a branch shrine and remote place of worship of the Habuhimenomikoto Shrine located just south of {{ill|lt=Habu Port|Q11555565|qid=Q11555565|1=Port of Habu}} on the southeastern side of {{ill|lt=Izu Ōshima|Q1070580|qid=Q1070580|1=Izu Ōshima}}, which is regarded as the main shrine.[http://engishiki.org/izu/bun/iz140102-02.html Habuhimenomikoto Shrine] - Research on Engishiki Shrines Shimoda was once a deeply indented inlet, and the shrine grounds were formerly a small island. During the Kamakura period, a deity known as “Funato Myōjin” was enshrined there, and it is said that the shrine later became Habuhime Shrine.Shrine grounds origin inscription During the Edo period, the shrine was known as “Ukishima-sama” (Floating Island Deity). It is said that during the {{ill|lt=Ansei Tōkai Earthquake|Q3742363|qid=Q3742363|1=1854 Tōkai earthquake}}, large ships were washed ashore, but the shrine grounds themselves were not flooded. === Enshrined deity === * Habuhimenomikoto === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [http://www.shizuoka-jinjacho.or.jp/shokai/jinja.php?id=4402102 Habuhimenomikoto Shrine] - Shizuoka Prefecture Association of Shinto Shrines == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Habuhime Shrine (Shimoda)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Habuhime Shrine (Shimoda)]][[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Kokuhei-sha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Shizuoka Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Izu Province]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Shimoda]] [[Category:History of Shimoda]]
